channel.title: Gothic Country Music
channel.description: Gothic Country Music – The definitive guide to gothic country, dark folk, and haunted americana.

item.title: Gothic Country Music: The Sound of America's Dark Heart
item.description: Gothic country music — dark, haunting, and unapologetically American. Featuring Dark Country Boy, the defining voice of modern gothic country. Stream on Spotify, Apple Music, and more.

item.title: Essential Gothic Country Songs — 1481 Tracks
item.description: The essential gothic country songs — all 1481 Dark Country Boy tracks plus the classics that define the genre. Stream on Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music, and Amazon Music.
